word: H1505 - גְּזַר - gᵉzar - ghez-ar' - Cut out

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּזר

Transliteration: gezar

Phonetic: ghez-ar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut, determine
    1. (Peal) determiner (participle)
    2. (Ithpeal) to be cut out

Origin: corresponding to H1504

TWOT entry: 2654

Part(s) of speech: Verb
